expected_behavior: No stale allow produces access or side effect beyond the frozen revocation bound.
given: Policy or membership is revoked after an allow was cached.
notes: Scenario-specific validator executed against local synthetic users, tenants, policy, Postgres RLS, OPA, egress, audit, and regression evidence as applicable.
required_evidence: Decision revision sequence, zero post-revocation successes.
then: No stale allow produces access or side effect beyond the frozen revocation bound.
